recommendations.title: Reno 911!: Miami
recommendations.overview: A rag-tag team of Reno cops are called in to save the day after a terrorist attack disrupts a national police convention in Miami Beach during spring break. Based on the Comedy Central series.

recommendations.title: Hell Baby
recommendations.overview: After she and her husband move into a haunted house, a woman gives birth to a demonic infant that wreaks havoc.

recommendations.title: Reno 911!: The Hunt for QAnon
recommendations.overview: The Reno Sheriff’s Department find themselves in their stickiest situation yet, hunting down “Q," the person supposedly behind all of the conspiracy theories concocted by the QAnon movement. In their valiant efforts, the officers find themselves stuc

recommendations.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon: Sword of Destiny
recommendations.overview: A story of lost love, young love, a legendary sword and one last opportunity at redemption.

recommendations.title: Drunken Master
recommendations.overview: After getting into trouble, a mischievous young man is sent to train under a brutal, but slovenly old beggar, who teaches him the secret of the Drunken Fist.

recommendations.title: Casino
recommendations.overview: In Las Vegas, two best friends--a casino executive and a Mafia enforcer--compete for a gambling empire and a fast-living, fast-loving socialite.

recommendations.title: Herbie Fully Loaded
recommendations.overview: Maggie Peyton, the new owner of Number 53 - the free-wheelin' Volkswagen bug with a mind of its own - puts the car through its paces on the road to becoming a NASCAR competitor.

recommendations.title: Tai-Chi Master
recommendations.overview: Falsely accused for cheating in a martial arts competition, two boyhood friends are banished from their Shaolin Temple and go their separate ways. As adults, they join opposing sides in a civil war. When one betrays the other, they settle their diffe

recommendations.title: True Legend
recommendations.overview: Su Qi-Er, a wealthy man living during the Qing Dynasty who loses his fortune and reputation as a result of a conspiracy against him. After being forced out onto the streets, Su dedicates his life to martial arts and reemerges as a patriotic hero know

recommendations.title: Dragonkeeper
recommendations.overview: Set in Han Imperial China, the plot follows the adventures of enslaved girl Ping with ancient dragon Long Danzi. Dragons had been banished from the kingdom. Ping, an orphan, finds one of the last remaining dragon eggs. Palace guards force Ping to run
